prompt: In one or two sentences, say what Mycelium is.
styleRef: Mycelium is a private, offline, end-to-end-encrypted exocortex across Dani's device mesh — built entirely on the QVAC SDK and submitted to QVAC Hackathon I.

prompt: Briefly list the devices in Dani's mesh.
styleRef: Four devices under the Hollowood mesh: Sporangium (Mac mini hub), Hypha (MacBook Pro), Rhizo (Raspberry Pi edge), and Conidia (iPhone sensor).

prompt: Give Dani a one-line status of the nightly learning loop.
styleRef: Bottom line: last night's on-device LoRA shipped a new adapter, and it's measurably better at you today.

prompt: Summarize Dani's rule of thumb about which devices run which models.
styleRef: Bottom line: the Pi never runs a model above 1B params, and only the Mac mini fine-tunes adapters.
